goldenRules: Hook files read stdin JSON and write to stdout/stderr
Each skill is a directory with SKILL.md as entry point
Skills may have scripts/, references/, and tests/ subdirectories
Agent definitions are markdown files in .claude/agents/

decisionQuickRef.pattern: Command Handler or lowest responsible layer
CommonJS hook + hook-runner conventions + hook tests
Update source .claude/skills, regenerate mirrors, verify divergence
Edit canonical source, never hand-edit generated mirror files

keyFileLocations.description: Runtime hooks for session initialization, safety gates, graph maintenance, and code formatting
Shared hook utilities consumed by hooks

registry.title: Project Structure Reference
registry.summary: Project directory structure, module boundaries, inventory counts, framework entry points, and scan targets.
registry.whenToRead: changing framework layout, module ownership, inventory counts, generated mirrors, or onboarding docs

registry.title: Backend Patterns Reference
registry.summary: Hook architecture, hook composition, shared hook libraries, state management, error handling, security, and hook testing patterns.
registry.whenToRead: changing hook code, hook libraries, hook state, hook error handling, security checks, or hook tests

registry.title: Seed Test Data Reference
registry.summary: Idempotent seeder architecture, DI scope safety, application-layer command dispatch, and config-driven counts for test-data seeding.
registry.whenToRead: implementing or reviewing test-data seeders, idempotent seeding, DI scope safety, or config-driven seed counts

registry.title: Frontend Patterns Reference
registry.summary: Frontend pattern status for this framework repository and guidance for target projects that define product UI conventions.
registry.whenToRead: working on frontend, component, store, or API-service conventions for a target project

registry.title: Integration Test Reference
registry.summary: Hook test architecture, suite organization, standalone test files, and local commands for running integration-style tests.
registry.whenToRead: adding, reviewing, or verifying hook integration tests, test suites, fixtures, or coverage gates

registry.title: Feature Documentation Reference
registry.summary: Feature Spec directory conventions, 8-section structure, test-case ID format, evidence rules, and spec-to-code registries.
registry.whenToRead: creating or updating Feature Specs, test cases, behavior docs, evidence mappings, or thin spec indexes

registry.title: Spec System Reference
registry.summary: Local spec root, canonical artifact ownership, test-case registry, derived artifact rules, and companion docs.
registry.whenToRead: changing spec paths, canonical spec ownership, generated spec aids, ERDs, indexes, or spec routing

registry.title: Project Spec Principles
registry.summary: Local spec authority, source routing, prose rules, evidence format, test mapping, generated artifact rules, and verification commands.
registry.whenToRead: writing spec prose, syncing specs with tests, reviewing SDD compliance, or refreshing generated prompt surfaces

registry.title: Workflow Spec Test Code Cycle Reference
registry.summary: Local workflow sequence, artifact owners, and closure gates for keeping specs, tests, code, docs, and generated mirrors aligned.
registry.whenToRead: coordinating behavior changes across specs, tests, implementation, docs, and generated mirrors

registry.title: Code Review Rules
registry.summary: Review rules for hooks, skills, agents, tests, naming, evidence, anti-patterns, review checklists, and blocking red flags.
registry.whenToRead: reviewing code, hooks, skills, agents, documentation, tests, generated artifacts, or change quality

registry.title: SCSS Styling Guide
registry.summary: Styling status for this framework repository and guidance for target projects that define SCSS or theming conventions.
registry.whenToRead: working on CSS, SCSS, styling conventions, theming, or target-project design-system setup

registry.title: Domain Entities Reference
registry.summary: Framework domain concepts and relationships for hooks, skills, agents, workflows, context groups, and modules.
registry.whenToRead: changing framework entity concepts, catalogs, routing rules, workflow relationships, or domain documentation

registry.title: E2E Test Reference
registry.summary: E2E test status for this framework repository plus target-project guidance for Playwright and page-object workflows.
registry.whenToRead: adding or reviewing E2E guidance, Playwright setup, page objects, or target-project browser tests

registry.title: Documentation Index Reference
registry.summary: Documentation inventory, documentation graph, key doc relationships, and keyword-to-doc lookup routing.
registry.whenToRead: locating project documentation, updating doc inventories, routing to reference docs, or checking doc counts

registry.title: Lessons
registry.summary: Project lessons learned and recurring failure-mode guardrails from prior framework maintenance work.
registry.whenToRead: starting non-trivial work, debugging recurring issues, reviewing generated mirrors, or extracting new lessons

registry.title: Design System
registry.summary: Design-system status for this framework repository and guidance that target projects should define their own UI inventory.
registry.whenToRead: working on design-system guidance, target-project tokens, component inventory, or UI convention setup
